changes.description: Rewrote SKILL.md: condensed verbose planning guide into concise, structured rules. Added explicit classification rules for task prioritization with strict ordering. Added JSON output format examples for both tasks.

Strengthened deferred classification rule: emphasized that ALL tasks with far-future deadline AND low impact go to deferred regardless of effort level. Added IMPORTANT note about checking rule 2 before rule 3.

Added instruction to use exact task names from input — do not rename, rephrase, or abbreviate. Fixed issue where model was renaming tasks (e.g., 'Prepare quarterly budget' -> 'Prepare quarterly budget report').
